  • Guidelines & Prompts
  • Character Vision (CVI)
  • Meet Mediluna — A Field Guide
  • Lore & Friends

Contributing & Guidelines

Mediluna welcomes fan art, wallpapers, stickers, and tasteful adventures. If you want to contribute, please keep her true to her spirit!

  • Keep her optimistic & kind. The world has enough cynical mascots.
  • Keep her outfit consistent. She loves her signature red bandana and backpack!
  • Let's skip the dark stuff. No AI apocalypse storylines or edgy redesigns.
  • Potato shape is allowed. If you draw her shaped like a potato... she is still Mediluna!
View Repo CONTRIBUTING.md View Prompt History
AI Prompt Blueprint

Copy this prompt template to generate your own consistent Mediluna art:

A highly-detailed, beautiful, and cute illustration of a friendly sea otter named Mediluna. She is standing on her hind legs, wearing a bright red bandana around her neck and a small brown hiking backpack on her back. She is happily holding a delicious silvery fish with both paws and smiling warmly...
Mediluna

Acquire fish. Ignore deadlines. 🦦🧣

Artwork is © its respective creators. Site compiled with 🧸 Boris.

Built with endless optimism & many snacks.
